key.name: wallpaper-folder
key.description: Path to the folder containing wallpaper images.

key.name: include-subfolders
key.description: Scan subfolders of the wallpaper folder recursively.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Which box to place the icon in: left, center, or right.

key.name: picture-options
key.description: How to scale the wallpaper: zoom, scaled, stretched, centered, or wallpaper.

key.name: auto-rotate
key.description: Automatically change wallpaper on a timer.

key.name: rotate-interval
key.description: How often to change the wallpaper when auto-rotate is on.

key.name: random-hotkey
key.description: Global hotkey to apply a random wallpaper instantly without opening the carousel.
